name: Powerhouse Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup apples, peeled, cored, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place 12 baking cups in a muffin pan or 12 foil cups on a cookie sheet; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine bran cereal and apple juice; stir well. Let stand for 4-5 minutes for the cereal to soften.
4. Add oil, apples, dried apricots or raisins, and walnuts to the cereal mixture.
5. Add dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, cinnamon) to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Fill each baking cup with muffin batter.
7. Bake for 18-22 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. On a sheet of wax paper, combine 1 tablespoon sugar and 1/8 teaspoon ground cinnamon.
9. Brush hot muffins with 1 tablespoon melted butter; sprinkle with the sugar mixture.
10. Remove muffins from the muffin pan or cookie sheet.
